heading: Scholarships
label: 12574 Scholarships
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14114 of Title 42

children.heading: Period of award
children.label: a Period of award
children.text: Scholarships awarded under this part shall be for a period of 1 academic year.

children.heading: Use of scholarships
children.label: b Use of scholarships
children.text: Each individual awarded a scholarship under this part may use the scholarship for educational expenses at an institution of higher education.
